sources.title: The Big Shot BOGART 1942
sources.description: Humphrey Bogart plays a convict (yeah, how unusual).

metadata.Plot: Three time loser Duke Berne risks life in prison with one more armored car robbery. His attorney's wife Lorna, Berne's old sweetheart, keeps him from it but he goes to jail anyway. Duke and Lorna get some time together again after he stages a prison break, but if he stays with her his old friend George will have to take the rap for killing one of the guards.
metadata.Writer: Bertram Millhauser, Abem Finkel, Daniel Fuchs
metadata.Actors: Humphrey Bogart, Irene Manning, Richard Travis
